#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.Target Map(global::Demo.Source s)
    {
        if (s is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
        return new global::Demo.Target
        {
            Amount = ParseInt(s.Amount),
        };
    }
}
